summary: iter46 — Self-service appeal flow for under_review clients. Backend (10/10 tests pass — 7 supplied + 3 authz regression) and Frontend (client submit + admin resolve + admin reject flows all working end-to-end via Playwright).
critical_code_review_comments: notifications.py notify_staff_new_appeal: recipients query correctly uses $or on role=admin OR (role=employee AND can_manage_blocklist=true); good separation of concerns.

appeals.py `_resolve_appeal_internal` properly guards against re-processing (status != 'pending' → 409) and never flips user.account_status — matches the documented contract that resolving is a message only, not activation.

AppealDialog toast handling correctly detects the 409 APPEAL_ALREADY_PENDING structured detail and reloads history so the user immediately sees the warning message; no submit button rendered when a pending appeal exists.
AdminAppeals dialog forces a non-empty response (client-side check + backend Pydantic min_length=1); confirm button is disabled until textarea has content.
Sidebar nav-appeals link with `data-testid=admin-nav-appeals` present and routing to `/admin/appeals` works correctly for both admin and employee-with-can_manage_blocklist.
MINOR (not blocking): AppealDialog import path `import { API } from "@/App"` — depends on App.js exporting API constant; already in use by other admin pages so consistent.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (client submit + pending-guard + admin resolve + admin reject + tab navigation)

test_credentials: Uses seeded test users from /app/memory/test_credentials.md: session cookies test_session_admin_X, test_session_normal_X etc.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily set user_test_normal01.account_status=under_review then restored to active. Planted one pending appeal for the admin reject scenario. All appeals + appeal notifications purged at end of testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature complete; no follow-up needed. If regressions surface later, run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_appeals.py /app/backend/tests/test_appeals_authz.py -v` (10 tests). Frontend test IDs: open-appeal-dialog-btn, appeal-dialog, appeal-message-textarea, appeal-submit-btn, admin-appeals-page, appeals-tab-{pending|resolved|rejected|all}, appeal-row-<id>, appeal-resolve-btn-<id>, appeal-reject-btn-<id>, appeal-action-dialog, appeal-response-textarea, appeal-action-confirm-btn, admin-nav-appeals.
